title: Easy Plesiosaurus Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Plesiosaurus Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Download and print this simple Plesiosaurus swimming in water. Perfect for young children. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Plesiosaurus was a prehistoric marine reptile with a broad body, short tail, and four powerful flippers used to fly through the water.
It lived during the Early Jurassic period and fed on small fish and squids, catching them with its sharp, interlocking teeth.
Its fossils were first discovered by the legendary paleontologist Mary Anning in England in 1823.
